mapper.sql: id, no, conference_type, name, year, direction, subject, number_of_people, budget_funds_amt, conference_form, online_url, open_date, open_time, close_date, close_time, city, address, host_type, is_charge, charge_manner, charge_bank, charge_account, charge_remark, register_start_date, register_end_date, register_manner, register_url, register_fee_amt, reg_fee_remark, fapiao_supplied, contact_person, contact_address, contact_tel, contact_email, contact_wechat, traffic_guide, accom_guide, applicant, data_status, sub_user_id, sub_date, sub_time, audit_status, audit_user_id, audit_date, audit_time, audit_desc, remark, dept_code, division_code, discipline_class, discipline_code, paper_num, fund_source, intro, operate_time, host_unit, assist_unit, conference_head, board_fee_amt, traffic_fee_amt, site_fee_amt, book_fee_amt, other_fee_amt, accom_fee_amt, conference_phone, outnum_of_people, travel_flag
mapper.select: select sach.id as rowId , sach.name as name,sach.no as no, csct.code as "conferenceType.id",csct.name as "conferenceType.name", sach.subject as subject,csy.code as "year.id",csy.name as "year.name",csy.name as yearName,sach.direction as direction,csct.name as conferenceTypeName, huser.id as "conferenceHead.id",huser.name as "conferenceHead.name",huser.name as conferenceHeadName,csl.code as "city.id",csl.name as "city.name", sach.outnum_of_people as outnumOfPeople,sach.conference_phone,sach.contact_address as contactAddress, sach.number_of_people as numberOfPeople,sach.open_date as openDate,sach.close_date as closeDate,sach.operate_time, sach.travel_flag as travelFlag,sach.fapiao_supplied as fapiaoSupplied,sach.remark as remark,sach.intro as intro, sdept.id as "deptCode.id",sdept.name as "deptCode.name",sdept.name as deptName,csru.code as "hostUnit.id",csru.name as "hostUnit.name",csru.name as hostUnitName, csru2.code as "assistUnit.id",csru2.name as "assistUnit.name",csru2.name as assistUnitName,ddept.id as "divisionCode.id",ddept.name as "divisionCode.name", sclass.code as "disciplineClass.id",sclass.name as "disciplineClass.name",sclass.name as disciplineClassName, fdiscipline.code as "disciplineCode.id",fdiscipline.name as "disciplineCode.name",fdiscipline.name as disciplineName, sach.register_fee_amt as registerFeeAmt,sach.budget_funds_amt as budgetFundsAmt, sach.paper_num as paperNum,sach.register_start_date as registerStartDate,sach.register_end_date as registerEndDate, sach.data_status as dataStatus,sach.create_time,suser.name as creatorName from srm_ac_conference_host sach left join ct_srm_conference_type csct on csct.code= sach.conference_type left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=sach.year left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=sach.conference_head left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=sach.creator_id left join ct_srm_location csl on csl.code=sach.city left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=sach.dept_code left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=sach.host_unit left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru2 on csru2.code=sach.assist_unit left join ct_srm_dept ddept on ddept.id=sach.division_code left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=sach.discipline_class left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=sach.discipline_code where sach.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_ac_conference_host
data_status = #{status},
audit_status = #{checkStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
